display.purpose: Hero headline only. Silkscreen extrabold at massive scale.

label.purpose: Nav, table headers, badges. Silkscreen uppercase.

mono.purpose: Terminal output, code. VT323 pixel font.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: All transitions and animations. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: reveal-duration
motion.purpose: Scroll reveal and page entrance animations.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: Main call-to-action. Mac: ink on paper. NeXT: light on black with bevel.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Silkscreen', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); background: oklch(14% 0.008 65); color: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); }

components.name: NeXT Primary CTA
components.description: NeXT mode CTA. Light background with raised bevel.
components.css: .ds-btn-next { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Silkscreen', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); background: oklch(58% 0.006 270); color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-next:hover { background: oklch(34% 0.006 270); color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); }

components.name: Tech Chip
components.description: Technology badge. Mac: flat border. NeXT: raised bevel.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Silkscreen', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; background: oklch(88.5% 0.006 85); border: 1px solid oklch(72% 0.005 85); color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); transition: border-color 0.12s; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: oklch(78% 0.16 75); } .ds-chip-dot { width: 4px; height: 4px; background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); margin-right: 6px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Fixed top nav. Mac: flat surface with 1px rule border. NeXT: dark surface with bevel.
components.html: HomeFeatures
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 0 16px; height: 56px; font-family: 'Silkscreen', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; background: oklch(88.5% 0.006 85); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(72% 0.005 85); } .ds-nav-link { padding: 6px 12px; color: oklch(30% 0.008 65); text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.12s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); } .ds-nav-active { color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); background: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); }

mac.name: Mac System 1 (1984)
mac.description: Warm-tinted oklch neutrals with amber gold accent. Flat 1px borders. Bitmap display font. Offset window shadows. Mac custom cursor. Dot grid parallax. Animated title bar stripes.

next.name: NeXTSTEP (1988)
next.description: Cool-tinted oklch grayscale. 2px 3D beveled edges. Scrolling CRT scanlines. Phosphor afterglow. No chromatic accent. The bevel carries emphasis.

narrative.overview: This design system inhabits two eras of personal computing. Day mode is Mac System 1 (1984): paper-white surfaces, 1px flat borders, bitmap type, offset drop shadows, zero border-radius. Night mode is NeXTSTEP (1988): deep black surfaces, 3D beveled edges, scrolling CRT scanlines, phosphor afterglow, zero border-radius. The theme toggle is not dark/light. It is a shift between two computing revolutions from the same lineage. Both modes share identical font families: Silkscreen for headings and labels, system-ui for body, VT323 for terminal and code. Only the colors and border strategies change between modes.
keyCharacteristics: Dual personality: Mac System 1 (day) and NeXTSTEP (night). Same fonts, different colors and borders.
Zero border-radius everywhere. Neither era had curves.
Flat 1px borders in Mac mode. 3D beveled edges in NeXT mode.
One accent in Mac (amber gold). No accent in NeXT (bevel is emphasis).
oklch color tokens. All neutrals tinted warm (Mac) or cool (NeXT).

rules.name: The Dual Era Rule
rules.body: Day and night are not light/dark variants. They are two distinct computing eras with different border strategies and color logic. Do not blend them.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Mac gets one saturated color (amber gold) under 10% of viewport. NeXT gets zero chromatic colors. The bevel is the emphasis.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: No pure black or white. All neutrals are oklch with chroma 0.003 to 0.008, tinted warm (85) or cool (270).

rules.name: The Unified Font Rule
rules.body: Both modes use the same font families. Only colors change. Display in Silkscreen, body in system-ui, terminal in VT323.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule (Mac)
rules.body: Mac surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only on window-level containers.

rules.name: The Bevel-Is-Elevation Rule (NeXT)
rules.body: Every NeXT surface has a bevel. Raised for protruding, sunken for recessed.

dos: Do use 1px flat borders in Mac mode and 2px beveled edges in NeXT mode.
Do use zero border-radius on every element.
Do use Silkscreen for display, system-ui for body, VT323 for terminal.
Do keep fonts identical between modes.
Do keep accent gold under 10% of Mac viewport.
Do keep NeXT mode pure grayscale.
Do use oklch for all tokens with tinted neutrals.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop blur.
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px.
Don't treat NeXT mode as generic dark mode.
Don't introduce chromatic color in NeXT mode.
Don't use pure black or pure white.
